Event: Royal Challenge - Season 17
Event Date: 01/09/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: RI99
Plantain Ring

Once in a while, the unit deals 130000 pure damage to the farthest enemy and disarms them for 3 sec. During this time, the enemy can’t use the weapon’s abilities. After the effect ends, the target is thrown off balance for 3 sec. They are unable to dodge attacks or deal critical damage for the duration.

Requirements: 98-100
